text: Narok County is the seventh largest county among the forty seven Counties in Kenya. It has an
area of 17,933.1 KM2. It borders Bomet County to the West, Kajiado County to the East and
Nakuru County to the North. To the South it borders the Republic of Tanzania. It also shares
common borders with Kisii, Nyamira and Migori counties to the West. It lies within longitude 35
